item.title: Blacksmithing a Gardener’s Dream Tool
item.description: A calm blacksmithing session shaping a useful garden tool with heat, hammer control, and careful finishing.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing a Gardener’s Dream Tool
media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing session shaping a useful garden tool with heat, hammer control, and careful finishing.

item.title: Organic Forging from Tubing
item.description: A calm blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focused on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

media:content.media:title: Organic Forging from Tubing
media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focused on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

item.title: Outdoor Forging Techniques and Shop Skills
item.description: A calm look at outdoor forging techniques and traditional shop skills, focused on process, precision, and handmade metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Outdoor Forging Techniques and Shop Skills
media:content.media:description: A calm look at outdoor forging techniques and traditional shop skills, focused on process, precision, and handmade metalwork.

item.title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
item.description: A calm forging project showing how a railroad spike is shaped into an axe through heat, hammering, and careful metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
media:content.media:description: A calm forging project showing how a railroad spike is shaped into an axe through heat, hammering, and careful metalwork.

item.title: 50lb Swage Block in the Forge

item.title: Forging Tradition, One Hammer at a Time.
item.description: A calm look at blacksmithing craft, where each hammer blow shapes metal with care, precision, and traditional shop skill.

item.title: Roy Hammer Air Assist Treadle

item.title: Need a Tool, Make a Tool.
item.description: A practical blacksmithing mindset: when a tool is needed, make one by hand. A simple, satisfying look at shop-made solutions and craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Need a Tool, Make a Tool.
media:content.media:description: A practical blacksmithing mindset: when a tool is needed, make one by hand. A simple, satisfying look at shop-made solutions and craftsmanship.

item.description: A practical review of sharpening drill bits with the Drill Doctor, focusing on tool maintenance, precision, and workshop efficiency.

item.title: Reimagining Mastermyr Viking Hinges
item.description: A calm look at reimagining Mastermyr Viking hinges, with a focus on blacksmithing process, shaping metal, and traditional shop craftsmanship.
